connectors.name: +V
connectors.description: Connect to the positive rail of the power supply in your circuit

connectors.name: Serial In
connectors.description: Connect to the 22K resistor of the PICAXE download circuit

connectors.name: In/Out 4
connectors.description: This pin can be used as a digital input and a digital output

connectors.name: In 3
connectors.description: This pin can be used as a digital input

connectors.name: In/Out 2
connectors.description: This pin can be used as a digital input and a digital output

connectors.name: In/Out 1
connectors.description: This pin can be used as a digital input and a digital output

connectors.name: Serial Out / Out 0
connectors.description: Connect to the output pin of the download connector for the PICAXE download circuit. This pin can be used as a digital output

connectors.name: 0V
connectors.description: Connect to the 0V (ground) of the power supply in your circuit
